posts.author: niftymonk
posts.text: Meta entering prediction markets? This could change how billions of people interact with financial risk — Meta is exploring a prediction market platform similar to Polymarket and Kalshi. image 1366×989 261 KB On one hand, this could introduce millions of people to a new asset class where markets price the probability of real-world events. On the other hand, Meta’s business has always been built around maximizing engagement. Combining a platform designed to keep users online with event-based speculation raises obvious questions. Will prediction markets become a useful tool for price discovery a…
